results.rendered_html:
yācanaṃ -nā [yāc-lyuṭ]
1 Asking, begging, entreating, soliciting.
2 A request, an entreaty, a petition; yācanā mānanāśāya;
(pb) vadhyatāmabhayayācanāṃjaliḥ  R. 11. 78.
